titleStmt.title: SII 29.29: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 29. (A.R. No. B. 238 of 1962-63.) PEṆṬA [KHUND], BODHAN TALUK, NIZAMABAD DISTRICT.

summary.p: On three faces of a slab lying in the field of Gangaram Patel in Survey No. 14.

It records a gift of income from several goods (named) and also of a garden, well and a mango-grove purchased from Divākara-bhaṭṭa of Bāḷeya, by the ubhayadēsis of Bāḷeya-Sāvaḷigeya-Pēṇṭhe, to the god Nakharēśvara of the village.
It is dated Śaka 980, Viḷambi, Phālguṇa śu. 1 Monday corresponding to 1059 A.D., February 16. [On the previous day viz., Māgha Amāvāsya, there occurred a solar eclipse].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrī
prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja para
mēsvara parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśra
ya kuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrī mattraiḷōkyamalladēvara vija
yarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhi
pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkka tāraṁ
baraṁ saluttamire sakavariṣa
980 neya viḷaṁbi saṁvatsarada
phālguṇa sudda pāḍiva sōmavā
radaṁdu bāḷeya sāvaḷigeya pēṁṭhe
ya nekarēsvara dēvarggalliyubhayadē
siyumiḻdaṁdina sūryyagrahaṇaṁ ni
mittyamāge biṭṭu koṭṭa suṁka nela
vatti pēṟeṁgaydaḍake yumaṁ

kāraḍakeya pēṟeṁ
goṁdaḍakeyama E
leya pēṟegippatta
ydeleyamaṁ meḷasi
na pēṟeṁge soḷasige me
ḷasuma katteya pēṟeṁ
ge Aḍavāga meḷasu
ma Uppina pēṟeṁgara
māna Uppumaṁ kōṇa
na pēṟeṁ go ḷa jōḷa
mamaṁ Uṁbaḷada kā
ḍigegoṁdu tammaṭa
maṁ kāpaṭada maḷa
vegoṁdu tammaṭamu
maṁ kuduregeraḍu
tammaṭamumaṁ
peḷavina maḷave
gaṭṭada kavaḷakeyu

kōṭegēriya pūrvvada
sanuviḻdu kuḍalu
bāḷeyada divākara
bhaṭṭara kayyalu ś
ṭevuṁ koṇḍu biṭṭa
tōṭamuṁ bāviyaṁ
māvināravermā
caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ pre
ti pāḷisidavaru Idaṁ
kiḍisidavaru bā
ṇarāsi yoḷkavile
yumaṁ brāhma
ṇarumaṁnaḷida
pātakamaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 29.29 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
